factors.rationale: The phone cases are visible but compete with each other, making it less dominant.
The image shows the cases without any context of use or ownership.
No specific buyer benefit is communicated in the image.
The arrangement of cases creates a somewhat cluttered visual experience.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
There are no visible trust signals in the image.
The image is mostly readable, but some elements may blend together.
